---
title: "Academic travels"
body-classes: travels-page
page-layout: full
---

<p class="page-subtitle travels-intro">
A map of the places my research has taken me. Perhaps we crossed paths at one of them.
</p>

```{=html}
<link rel="stylesheet" href="/assets/vendor/leaflet/leaflet.css">
<link rel="stylesheet" href="/assets/vendor/leaflet-markercluster/MarkerCluster.css">
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.maptiler.com/maptiler-sdk-js/v3.9.0/maptiler-sdk.css">

<div class="travels-shell"
     data-travel-map
     data-maptiler-key="kSpsVldgGYqG1YgICPnI"
     data-source="/assets/data/academic-travels.json">

  <section class="travels-toolbar" aria-labelledby="travels-filter-heading">
    <div class="travels-toolbar-copy">
      <h2 id="travels-filter-heading">Explore by year</h2>
      <p id="travels-result-summary" class="travels-result-summary" aria-live="polite">
        Loading events…
      </p>
    </div>

    <div id="travels-year-filters"
         class="travels-year-filters"
         role="group"
         aria-label="Filter events by year"></div>
  </section>

  <div class="travels-explorer">
    <section class="travels-map-panel" aria-labelledby="travels-map-heading">
      <h2 id="travels-map-heading" class="visually-hidden">Interactive conference map</h2>

      <div id="travels-map"
           class="travels-map"
           aria-label="Interactive world map of academic events"
           aria-describedby="travels-map-help"></div>

      <div class="travels-map-footer">
        <p id="travels-map-help">
          Drag to move the map. Scroll over it to zoom, or select an event from the list.
        </p>
        <div class="travels-map-actions">
          <button id="travels-map-gesture-toggle"
                  class="travels-map-gesture-toggle"
                  type="button"
                  aria-pressed="false"
                  hidden>
            Enable map dragging
          </button>
          <button id="travels-reset-map" class="travels-reset-map" type="button">
            Reset map
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>

    <section class="travels-list-panel" aria-labelledby="travels-list-heading">
      <header class="travels-list-header">
        <h2 id="travels-list-heading">Events</h2>
        <span id="travels-list-count" class="travels-list-count"></span>
      </header>

      <ol id="travels-event-list" class="travels-event-list"></ol>
    </section>
  </div>

  <p id="travels-error" class="travels-error" role="alert" hidden></p>

  <noscript>
    <p class="travels-error">
      This map requires JavaScript. Selected recordings and slides remain available on the
      <a href="/talks/">Talks page</a>.
    </p>
  </noscript>
</div>

<script src="/assets/vendor/leaflet/leaflet.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.maptiler.com/maptiler-sdk-js/v3.9.0/maptiler-sdk.umd.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.maptiler.com/leaflet-maptilersdk/v4.1.1/leaflet-maptilersdk.umd.min.js"></script>
<script src="/assets/vendor/leaflet-markercluster/leaflet.markercluster.js"></script>
<script src="/assets/js/academic-travels-map.js"></script>
```
